title: simpa 4PC Flavoured Dog Bone Chew Set: Beef, Chicken, Bacon & Vanilla Flavour Chew 20cm (L). Cleans Teeth & Massages Gums. Made in the UK.
features: Delicious Flavour Variety: This set includes four dog bone chews infused with irresistible flavors—Beef, Chicken, Bacon, and Vanilla—keeping your furry friend entertained and satisfied.
Durable Nylon Construction: Made from 100% high-quality nylon, these chews are tough, long-lasting, and perfect for dogs who love to chew.
Supports Dental Health: Designed to clean teeth and massage gums, these chews promote better oral hygiene and reduce plaque buildup during playtime.
Made in the UK: Proudly manufactured in the UK, these chew bones adhere to strict quality standards, ensuring safety and enjoyment for your pet.
Perfect Size for Chewers: Measuring approximately 20cm (L) x 5cm (W) x 3.5cm (Thickness), these bones are ideal for medium to large dogs who enjoy chewing
